skills.name: natural-language-session-orchestrator
skills.summary: Runs the multi-turn discovery session that converts natural language into an approved requirement workspace.

skills.name: requirement-intent-classifier
skills.summary: Classifies user utterances and documents into requirement-relevant intent categories.

skills.name: document-and-repo-input-adapter
skills.summary: Normalizes requirements from documents, archives, API definitions, issue trackers, and example repositories.

skills.name: product-glossary-builder
skills.summary: Builds and maintains the domain glossary, aliases, acronyms, and disambiguation rules for a synthesis workspace.

skills.name: stakeholder-and-actor-extractor
skills.summary: Extracts stakeholders, system actors, external systems, responsibilities, and access expectations.

skills.name: functional-requirement-extractor
skills.summary: Extracts atomic, testable functional requirements from natural language and source materials.

skills.name: nonfunctional-requirement-extractor
skills.summary: Extracts quality attributes, operational constraints, compliance needs, and measurable service expectations.

skills.name: constraint-assumption-extractor
skills.summary: Extracts technical, organizational, legal, schedule, budget, and environment constraints while maintaining an explicit assumption ledger.

skills.name: ambiguity-question-generator
skills.summary: Generates minimal, high-value clarification questions ranked by expected impact.

skills.name: conversation-memory-to-spec
skills.summary: Consolidates approved multi-turn conversation facts into the requirement specification while preserving supersession history.
